title: The Last Cars Are Cut Away
description: Robin’s decision and the crew’s determination collide as the Sea Train carries everyone closer to Enies Lobby.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Wanze, Nami, Chopper. Robin’s decision and the crew’s determination collide as the Sea Train carries everyone closer to Enies Lobby.

dialogue.speaker: Wanze
dialogue.text: I have to avoid touching the Ramen.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There's only one place I can attack!!

dialogue.speaker: Wanze
dialogue.text: Try to dodge this!! Ramen kenpo...

summary: Robin’s decision and the crew’s determination collide as the Sea Train carries everyone closer to Enies Lobby.
